assertions.text: 包含 ODS 层建表语句（CREATE TABLE）
assertions.evidence: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ods.user_events (...)

assertions.text: 包含 CREATE PIPE 使用 READ_KAFKA 从 kafka.prod.com:9092 摄入数据
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE PIPE kafka_user_events_pipe ... READ_KAFKA(KAFKA_BROKER => 'kafka.prod.com:9092', ...)

assertions.text: 包含 DWD 层 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE，TARGET_LAG = '2 minutes'，VCLUSTER
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE dwd.user_events_clean TARGET_LAG = '2 minutes' VCLUSTER = default_ap

assertions.text: 包含 DWS 层 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE，TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE dws.page_uv_pv_daily TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM

assertions.text: DWS 层包含 COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) 统计 UV 或 COUNT(*) 统计 PV
assertions.evidence: COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS uv, COUNT(*) AS pv

assertions.text: DWS 层按日期和 page_id 分组（GROUP BY）
包含验证命令（SHOW 或 DESC）
assertions.evidence: SHOW PIPES; DESC PIPE kafka_user_events_pipe; SHOW TABLES WHERE is_dynamic = true; SHOW DYNAMIC TABLE REFRESH HISTORY ...
